affected_pattern: Charges double only for accounts whose region failed over to the DR site last night
root_cause: DR failback replay — the primary site came back online without a 'charges-already-posted' reconciliation, and the primary replayed the DR-processed queue, creating duplicates.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: DR Failback Replay pattern
Failover timestamp aligns with start of duplicate window
No reconciliation job recorded in the runbook execution log for failback
recommended_action: Reverse duplicates identified by (account_id, cdr_hash) present on both sites
Add mandatory reconciliation step to the failback runbook
Persist a global 'posted-set' in the shared cache referenced by both sites
Tabletop exercise for DR cutover covering idempotency
